Text: Dual Fang means wielding your two blades separately. Start by using either Steel Fangs or Dread Fangs, then press the attack.
Dual Fang means wielding your two blades separately. Start by using either Steel Fangs or Reaving Fangs, then press the attack.
After using the Dual Fang weaponskills Steel Fangs or Dread Fangs, their icons will automatically change to the next action in the combo.
After using the Dual Fang weaponskills Steel Fangs or Reaving Fangs, their icons will automatically change to the next action in the combo.
Open with Dreadwinder, then transition with either Twinfang Bite or Twinblood Bite from Dual Fang stance.
Open with Vicewinder, then transition with either Twinfang Bite or Twinblood Bite from Dual Fang stance.
The Viper stance weaponskill Dreadwinder can be followed by Hunter's Coil or Swiftskin's Coil.
The Viper stance weaponskill Vicewinder can be followed by Hunter's Coil or Swiftskin's Coil.
Start with Steel Fangs or Dread Fangs, then follow up with a second and third attack.
Start with Steel Fangs or Reaving Fangs, then follow up with a second and third attack.
After using the Dual Fang weaponskills Steel Fangs or Dread Fangs, their icons will automatically change to the next action in the combo.
After using the Dual Fang weaponskills Steel Fangs or Reaving Fangs, their icons will automatically change to the next action in the combo.
After Dreadwinder, end your sequence with either Twinfang Bite or Twinblood Bite.
After Vicewinder, end your sequence with either Twinfang Bite or Twinblood Bite.
The Viper stance weaponskill Dreadwinder can be followed by Hunter's Coil or Swiftskin's Coil.
The Viper stance weaponskill Vicewinder can be followed by Hunter's Coil or Swiftskin's Coil.
